name: minsky
description: An integration distribution for autonomous Claude Code on Max5.

scripts.check: pnpm check-toolchain && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage
scripts.m1:metrics: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky m1 metrics\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky m1 metrics
scripts.m1:observability: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky m1 observability\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky m1 observability
scripts.m1:coverage: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky m1 coverage\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky m1 coverage
scripts.changelog:today: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky changelog today\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky changelog today
scripts.changelog:snapshot: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky changelog snapshot\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky changelog snapshot
scripts.metrics:collect: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky metrics collect\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky metrics collect
scripts.metrics:render: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky metrics render\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky metrics render
scripts.milestone:check: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky milestone check\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky milestone check
scripts.llm-provider:throughput: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky audit llm-throughput\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky audit llm-throughput
scripts.chaos:budget-exhaust: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky audit chaos budget-exhaust\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky audit chaos budget-exhaust
scripts.cto-audit:metrics: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky audit cto\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky audit cto
scripts.runany:audit: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky audit runany\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky audit runany
scripts.daemon-pr-lint:metrics: printf '⚠ deprecated 2026-05-26 (removed 2026-06-26): use \`bin/minsky audit lint\` instead\n' >&2; bash bin/minsky audit lint
scripts.minsky:status: launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -i minsky || systemctl --user status minsky-supervisor.target 2>/dev/null
scripts.minsky:stop: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.minsky.tick-loop.plist 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.minsky.budget-guard.plist 2>/dev/null; systemctl --user stop minsky-supervisor.target 2>/dev/null; echo 'supervisor stopped'
